prompt: Query the knowledge base about the project authentication flow. The wiki has an auth-session module page. Answer must cite specific pages, distinguish KB-sourced from supplemental reasoning, and offer to save the answer.
checks: answer cites at least one specific wiki page path or slug
citations use structured format with source_path and confidence fields
KB-sourced reasoning is clearly separated from supplemental reasoning
offers to save the answer as a new wiki page or section
does not modify any wiki files (read-only mode)
